programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Hairdresser Barry styles the hair of the creme de la creme But when his clients wind up blackmailed to pay Barrys loan shark can the Harts help Barry break free before someone else winds up dead

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey assist Sgt McKenna newly returned from drug rehab A captain who used to work under Lt Samuels envisions changes at the precinct

programme.title: Starsky 216
programme.desc: Starsky 216

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Marella unofficially asks String and Dom to attempt a rescue mission when Archangel is captured by rival agents and his wing of the Firm is disavowed Archangel had embarked on a rescue mission for a former lover which he later discovers is a trap to lure him to his capture and subsequent brainwashing String and Dom must find Archangel and deprogram him before he can assassinate the Firms top leader Zeus

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan learns that a woman is using a deadly quilt to murder members of a religious sect but the tightly-knit group blames him for the killing

programme.title: OPReEpisode
programme.desc: When Matt almost gets run down by a posse of graffiti-packing gangsters he sets into motion a plan of revenge against Lyndah

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After Ronnie suffers a near-fatal wound during an attack on the lot he reconsiders his role in the repo business

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to No More Mr Nice Guy the twin daughters of the cop who killed Freddy find that whenever one is attacked by the man of their dreams the other is wounded So the sisters team up to try to get Freddy out of their dreams for good

programme.title: Tales from Crypt
programme.desc: In a research lab when two colleagues accidentally inject an experimental virus into their sleazy boss that will eventually kill him he tries to get revenge on them believing it was no accident

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Danny Darwin learns that his new tattoo might be more than just a tattoo

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A model desperate for fame hooks up with a crazed fashion photographer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Overbearing control freak Jeremy and his long-suffering wife Julie are a squabbling young rich couple who encounter unexpected trouble in the form of a scruffy biker and his pregnant girlfriend while embarking on a road trip to Sunnyvale Can a surprise journey through time enable the obsessive Jeremy to successfully avert a tragic disaster

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric jumps a train in his quest for Skorzeny He finds a band of hobos who are suspicious of him when one of their members has his throat slit while they sleep

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: When a werewolf murders some homeless kids Eric tracks it to a mall and finds a homeless girl living there He runs out of silver bullets and fashions a silver crossbow arrow slaying the werewolf Only to find that its the homeless girl

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A pop radio psychiatrist is horrified because one of her call-in listeners commits murder while she is on the air and Nick helps her get her confidence back

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack travel to a small town where the disappearance of several children is linked to a mysterious toy playhouse

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While The Professor tries to round up enough metal to make an anchor for a raft with an SOS message attached to it Gilligan reels in a World War II underwater mine from the lagoon

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E36
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E36

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E18
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E18

programme.title: Smart 507
programme.desc: Smart 507

programme.title: Smart 501
programme.desc: Smart 501

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While Hogan detains a German general during an Allied offensive a Gestapo officer looks into Stalag 13s perfect escape record

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans latest underground contacts are secretly German spies

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys must scheme to procure new engines for their beloved boat before Binghamton ships the 73 Crew out to a new location

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton angers some of the native islanders then must make amends with them in order to make a good impression on a certain VIP who is due soon for a visit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer makes friends with a hillbilly named Branch

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Troy is captured while trying to make contact with the underground in a small village At stake is micro-film information about a new type of bomb the Germans have developed

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: When a Savoy employee is busted with an underage prostitute the sheriff the FBI and the casino all make their play to get the parties to cooperate Meanwhile Dixon and Violets romance heats up

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A yacht trip becomes dangerous when one of the Harts guests is blackmailed into running drugs

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Her snobby rivals stay at the Stratford makes Stephanie question her marriage to Michael due to his non-blue blood background

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Japanese investors buy everything in town except the Stratford Inn and convert the town into a giant golf course

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everyone becomes suspicious of Gilligan when they discover that hes been keeping a diary and they respond by creating their own written accounts of how they saved Gilligan from the Japanese soldier

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch investigates the disappearance of two Baywatch lifeguards without a trace in the water going after cries of drowning When Donna also goes missing Mitch investigates an old auto accident with one survivor who may hold a clue to the disappearances

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After being denied a raise Carlos goes after Ronnies reputation in a vengeful act of spite First when an unexpected guest arrives at Ronnie and Froys repo theyre scrambling to uncover her true identity Later Matt and Ronnie repo a Porsche from a maniac whose drastic approach to save his car sends Matt running for the hills And finally when Carlos and Ronnie come face to face during their repo of a cable van will their personal problems result in a catastrophic loss TV-14-L

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo Carlos tries to make amends

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Family friend Swamp Molly asks Bo and Luke to deliver a load of moonshine but the shipment is really illegal firearms

programme.title: Hercules 201
programme.desc: Hercules 201

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A CVI malfunctions and kills a soon-to-be father The investigation leads Liam and Renee to a fertility clinic Renee finds out she is infertile and suspects that Taelon technology is affecting worldwide fertility

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A young loner who believes he is a vampire is accused of murdering his mothers boyfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After seemingly having no interest for so many episodes what happened to Jim Tressa is suddenly in Peru and sidetracked by a voice from her past on a radio

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A wandering energy force inhabits the body of Alpha technician Anton Zoref turning him into an energy absorbing being

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Young 219
programme.desc: Young 219

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: In order to stop a psychotic priest killer Lt Stone goes undercover as a Roman Catholic priest The victims were all clergymen who studied at the same seminary

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force mixes dinner and danger at a crime czars private party Jack Wellman has arranged the deaths of four Government officials so he can fill the vacancies with men he controls

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While running from the police Kimble borrows another mans wallet to pay for a train ticket He goes to great lengths to return the wallet and money but in so doing he sees the man murdered and becomes the chief suspect in his death

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A poetry-loving stranger on the run from the Cavalry camps out at the Barkley ranch

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Lana is happy to be reunited with her long-lost brother Lyle on the distant video world of Tetris Kevin and Lyle join forces to stop Mother Brain from taking Tetriss power source the Sacred Square

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A football game against Dr Wilys robot masters brings acquaintances of Kevin from high school to Videoland The N team ought to play good and win because the prize is the throne of Videoland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Sheila saves a girl named Karina from a magic trap but Karina turns evil Meanwhile the kids are looking for a pair of magic rings that might send them home not realizing that Karina has one of the rings

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids encounter a race of tiny friendly dragons who are being hunted by an evil king By saving the dragons they may find their way home

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents try to convince Gadget that he can replace the King of Pianostan

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain head to an island in the Pacific Ocean where MAD plan to explode an underwater bomb

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians try to help a planet whose elfin inhabitants have been conquered by the Renegades who have stolen the elves amazingly powerful Tramulet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Trindles recover their Tramulet with the Guardians help and turn Cy-Kills plans against him
